text: If restricted visibility is encountered in an accommodation fire, you would

options.text: B) Stand up straight to keep your head above the smoke
C) Use a fan to blow the smoke and flames
D) Rig lifelines to assist a retreat

explanation: In smoke-filled compartments with limited visibility, lifelines are essential for safety. They guide firefighters back to the exit point, ensuring that even if they become disoriented or visibility drops to zero, they can find their way out.
